content:
IRDAI introduced Arogya Sanjeevani as a standard health insurance product in 2020. Every insurer must offer it with identical features, making it easy to compare across companies purely on price. Star Health offers its own Arogya Sanjeevani as well as the premium Star Comprehensive plan. Here's when each makes sense.

Arogya Sanjeevani: A standard plan with a cover range of Rs 1 lakh to Rs 10 lakh. Basic inpatient hospitalization, 30-day pre and 60-day post hospitalization. 5 percent co-payment on every claim. Room rent capped at 2 percent of sum insured per day. Day care procedures covered. No room upgrades, no OPD, no consumable cover. It's the most affordable option for someone who wants basic hospitalization cover and nothing else.

Star Health Comprehensive: A premium plan covering inpatient, OPD (at network hospitals), home care, mental health treatment, modern treatments, organ donor expenses, and robotic surgeries. No room rent sub-limit. No mandatory co-payment. No disease-specific sub-limits. Sum insured options from Rs 5 lakh to Rs 1 crore.

Premium comparison for a 35-year-old, individual cover. Arogya Sanjeevani at Rs 5 lakh: approximately Rs 4,500 to Rs 5,500 per year. Star Comprehensive at Rs 5 lakh: approximately Rs 7,000 to Rs 9,000 per year. The gap is about Rs 3,000 to Rs 4,000 per year.

My recommendation: If budget is very tight, start with Arogya Sanjeevani and upgrade later. If you can afford the extra Rs 300 per month, Star Comprehensive's benefits, especially OPD and no co-payment, make it worth the additional cost for most families in Gorakhpur.

For families with members above 50, always choose the comprehensive plan. The co-payment in Arogya Sanjeevani becomes significant with larger claims.

Call me at 9415313434 for an exact premium comparison for your family's age profile.

Use our free [Premium Calculator](/calculators/premium) to estimate health insurance premiums.
contentHi:
आरोग्य संजीवनी: Rs 1-10 लाख, 5% को-पेमेंट, रूम रेंट 2% सीमा। Rs 5 लाख: Rs 4,500-5,500/वर्ष।

Star Comprehensive: OPD, होम केयर, रोबोटिक सर्जरी, को-पेमेंट नहीं, रूम रेंट सीमा नहीं। Rs 5 लाख: Rs 7,000-9,000/वर्ष।

सलाह: बजट तंग है तो आरोग्य संजीवनी। Rs 300/माह अतिरिक्त दे सकते हैं तो Star Comprehensive। 50+ के लिए हमेशा Comprehensive। 9415313434 पर कॉल करें।
